summary: First iteration end-to-end tests for ClipCut. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases pass (auth login/logout/register/me, plan gating, upload+full ffmpeg pipeline to done, download, billing upgrade). Frontend: Playwright covered landing testids, admin login, 5-step wizard upload of /tmp/test_video.mp4, redirect to /projects/:id, polled status through queued->transcribing->cutting->rendering->done (~30s), result-video + download-btn visible, create-another navigates to /new, billing page shows current-plan (studio) and 4 plan cards, upgrade-creator switched plan (studio->creator) as reflected in current-plan, logout returns to /login, /dashboard is protected (redirects to /login when logged out). Admin plan restored to studio after test.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py set_auth_cookies uses samesite=none/secure=true - fine since frontend+backend share domain via ingress. If a same-origin call fails cross-origin in future deploys, revisit.
server.py get_project responses expose input_path/output_path/thumbnail_path (absolute container paths) - minor info leak; consider stripping in _project_public.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event; consider lifespan handler for future FastAPI versions.
video pipeline runs in background asyncio.create_task without persistence; if backend restarts mid-render, project will be stuck in transcribing/cutting/rendering state.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users via register in tests; created TEST_e2e and TEST_e2e_ui projects.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_clipcut_backend.py (12 tests, ~7s). Pipeline done in ~5s for 8s test video. All happy-path flows green; MOCKED transcription (synthetic captions) and MOCKED Razorpay billing (just DB update).
mocked_apis_verified: Transcription (synth_captions) - working, produces SRT and burn-in
Razorpay upgrade - working, DB updated and reflected in /api/auth/me
